nodes.label: no human touch
nodes.description: Every platform operation is fully automated. No manual steps, no human approvals in the critical path.

nodes.label: no fixed cost
nodes.description: The platform has zero cost when idle. Compute, networking, and tooling scale to zero outside active use.

nodes.label: no platform ops
nodes.description: The platform operates itself. No dedicated ops team, no on-call rotations, no runbooks.

nodes.label: no unapproved resources
nodes.description: Only pre-approved resource types can be deployed. Policy enforcement is automated and unbypassable.

nodes.label: Join
nodes.description: An application team joins the platform by raising a pull request with their profile.

nodes.label: Request
nodes.description: The platform reviews the application profile and validates it against the design decisions.

nodes.label: Deploy
nodes.description: A compliant landing zone is provisioned automatically from the approved profile.

nodes.label: Knowledge Graph
nodes.description: Captures the reasoning behind every platform decision.

nodes.label: Operations
nodes.description: How AI operates the platform — decisions to respect, files to touch, sequence to follow.

nodes.label: Big Bang
nodes.description: Workflows that bring the platform from nothing to life.
